system.description: When you really want to ruin someone’s day, open a door near somebody and roll [quality].

outcomes.success:
the absolute last person the target wants to see right now enters the room. They do not necessarily like you or want to cooperate with you, but they are definitely trouble for the target. They will be returned to where they came from in an hour, if they are still there.

While this effect is active, any time the target or summoned person performs any of the following actions, you may activate one of the For each additional 3 effects from this ability without rolling:

  • Throws a drink in someone else’s face
  • Starts crying
  • Storms out of the room
  • Flips or violently clears a table
  • Reveals a dark secret
outcomes.eachplus3:
choose one:
  • Another person the target does not want to see, or a supporter of a previous person summoned with this ability, enters.
  • An alternate version of the first person to enter also enters, (as in Your Best Self). You choose what’s different.
  • An object appears (as in What’s That Over There?) to make the target’s current situation even less comfortable.
outcomes.failure: the room around you distorts to become the worst party for you imaginable. Your seven greatest foes come through the door, mundane and Anomalous. If this causes Anomalies to be removed from the Vault, the Agency will consider you responsible for their capture and return.
